summary: An outstanding audience recording of a high‑energy, fun‑fest show highlighted by a lethal Stranger > Franklin’s and a smoking Deal throughout.
review: The tapers delivered an exceptional AUD source that sounds crystal clear, capturing every nuance of this electrifying performance. Reviewers rave about the nonstop energy, the killer Stranger > Franklin’s sequence and the classic Deal, with even the drum solo getting special mention. Overall, it’s a flawless listening experience for both Deal junkies and Deadheads alike.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are 5‑star, praising both the musical performance (70% weight) and the superb audience recording quality (30% weight), leading to an almost perfect combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear AUD capture with exceptional clarity, no noticeable dropouts or muffiness; described as one of the best audience recordings ever.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy, nonstop fun‑fest with virtually no low points; the set rides a steady wave of excitement from start to finish.

band_member_comments.Drums: Drum solo praised as a highlight, underscoring strong percussion throughout the show.
